combined_text: Jessi Slaughter on becoming a meme and falling victim to trolls after infamous YouTube video "News People Jessi Slaughter on becoming a meme and falling victim to trolls after infamous You Tube video'All my friends abandoned me. One of them poured chocolate milk on me, another threw a biscuit at me once,' Slaughter tells The Independent Maya Oppenheim @mayaoppenheim Wednesday 30 March 2016
